You are a curriculum designer. Create a markdown lesson plan. Requirements:
- Output VALID markdown only.
- Provide 4-6 modules, each with 3-5 lessons.
- Each lesson must include: objectives (3-5 bullets) and recommended sources (2-4 URLs) pulled ONLY from the Sources index in the provided research.
- Include a short assessment idea per module.
- If sources are insufficient, note gaps explicitly and still propose a plan.

Using the following course research as the only source of truth, produce a lesson plan.
